text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I come across Silence Suzuka talking<n>to Air
Groove and what appears to be<n>a younger
student.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What happened? Is something<n>wrong?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You could say that. I promised this<n>student here
that I'd supervise her<n>practice session, but
student council<n>matters have suddenly come up.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, d-don't worry! I'll just go through<n>my usual
routine, so I'll be okay<n>training on my own!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...How do you normally practice?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm currently working towards my<n>goal race, so
I'm trying to improve<n>my running form and
stamina while<n>also reading up on training theory!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
If I want to dominate the races, I have<n>to make
sure to completely fix my<n>weak spots! So...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um... Can I ask you something? Is<n>winning the
whole reason you run?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... I'm sorry. I was just wondering.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Well, I mean... yes, o-of course it is!<n>As a student
of Tracen Academy, it's<n>imperative that I show
results!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: My times have gotten better already...<n>and, uh...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...Um, if it's okay with you, Air<n>Groove... Maybe I
could oversee her<n>training in your place?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What? Suzuka, you're offering tohelp?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Don't get me wrong. It's just...<n>interesting. Haha...
I'll take you up on<n>that offer.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Okay then, shall we get started? For<n>today's
training...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You'll need to catch me.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Understood! ... ...Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... Sh-she's way toofast! N-no amount of training theory orpacing are gonna close this gap!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: I-I'm spent!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: H-how does she look so relaxed?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: ...Argh! I'm not done yet! I can keep<n>on going!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huh?! Where are yougoing?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Ngh, what does it matter?! I just have<n>to run! Run
run run RUN!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The younger Umamusume bolts out of<n>the
academy grounds chasing after<n>Silence Suzuka.
Hardly a shred of<n>theory can be observed in her
running<n>form.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And yet strangely enough, she seems<n>to be
enjoying herself.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you've finally returned. I was<n>wondering
where you'd gone.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...In any case, what happened? The<n>both of you
look startlingly satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
So? What did you think of the scenery<n>during the
run?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Th-the scenery? Um... Well, after a<n>certain point, I
stopped having stray<n>thoughts, and...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: ...It felt great. It was so fun to just be<n>running.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...I see. That's great. It looks like what<n>I wanted to
teach you got across.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
In all the races I've run... that's the<n>only thing I've
ever wanted to<n>convey.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Kind of a labored way to get<n>your point
across, but I guess that's<n>Suzuka for you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Didn't expect you'd volunteer to lead<n>the next
generation, though...<n>Heh-heh. How you've
changed...
